titleStmt.title: SII 27.72: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 72. (A.R. No. 469 of 1928-29.) KUḶĀI, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Durgā-Paramēśvari temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1320, Īśvara, Māgha 1, Sunday corresponding to 1398 A.D., January 20, Sunday, f.d.t. ·80. The Śaka year, however, was current.

It records gifts of land to the temple of Puḷupinadēva at Chitrapura, by Gōpīnātha-sēnabova and Kēśavanātha-sēnabōva, sons of Bāchapa-sēnabōva, who purchased the same from Malapa-seṭṭi, son of Padumaṇṇa-seṭṭi for that purpose. It also specifies the amount of paddy, obviously produced from the endowed land, to be distributed to several deities probably consecrated within the temple and states that the income in excess of the specified quantity might be enjoyed by the two donors. The land was made free from payment of siddāya. Varadēndratīrtha-śrīpāda was to maintain this charity (probably the sattra) in the Durgādēvi temple at Chitrapura. The record states that Haḍapada Mādarasa, son of Paṇḍaridēva was governing Mangalūrurājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ svastiśrī namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara
cāravē ttyelōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . jayādcudaya
śakavaruṣa 1320 neya varttamāna yīśvara saṁvatsarada maphemā
sa prathamaneya Ādivāra śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rā
ja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa hariharamahārāyara rā
jyādbhudayadalu paṁḍaridēvagaḷa kumāra haḍapada mādarasa
ru maṁgalūra rājyavanāḷutihakāladalu bācapa sēnabōva
ramakkaḷu gōpīnātha kēśavanātha sēnabōvaru māḍuva dhaṁ
rmma citrapurada puḷupina dēvālyadalu Āṟumaṁdi brā
hmara bhōjanada chatrakke vastuvakoṭṭu padumaṁṇaseṭṭiyara ma
kkaḷu malapaseṭiyara kayalu dhārāpūrvvakavāgikoṁḍa bhū
miya vivara hariyakaḷadalu Uḷakkaḷada bhūmibayalu bittu
va bedekāra mūḍe 50 berddaṁ bittuva bedekāru mūḍe 25 Ā ba
ḍagaṇa hiriya huṇiyaṁda hoṟagaṇa vogara
lu bituva bedekāru mūḍe 62 Aṁtu bayalu bāya
vogaru saha bedekāru mūḍe 83 Adana Uḷavakemaraphala
tōṭa pode beṭana hekalu kaṁdakadiru tuṁbe lokkisaha
yi dharṁmake Alibahagaṇeya bhatada voḷagemaṁga
lūra kaṁcina hāneyalu 15 lu prativaruṣa 1 kaṁ bhatamūḍe 180 mara
phalada Anubhavada kēṇiyaṁda mōluveccakke saluvadu ga 39yi bha
ta hoṁnu dharṁmmakke saṁdu Ā bhūmiyali Adhika Enu Uṁ
ṭellavanū gōpīnātha kēśavanāthadēvagaḷu bhōgisi baharu I bhū
mi Arasiṁge sidhāyavilla Alibhaṁḍāri dēvari
ge bhatamūḍe 10 śrītima dēvarige bhata
mūḍe 2 śrī maṁjanāthadēvarige si bhatta mūḍe 12 Aṁtu
si bhatamūḍe 47 nū naḍayisi Ā dharṁmma vanū na ḍayasi
Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyāgi sukhadali bāḷuvaru Arasiṁ
ge siddāya hariḍinavaṁge sīme Ila
biṭu bayaluse muṁtāgi Ā U yavāginaḍa
Udavanaṁ tappinadā
daḍe Arasiṁge Ātana taleyu sāvira noṟu hoṁ
nu daṁḍa Arasu tappidanādaḍe vāraṇāsiyalu sāvirakavile sā
vira brāhmarakoṁda dōṣa yidharṁma pālisidavarige
yasu Ahudu yidharṁmmavanu daṁnaḷi
mavara dēṁdra śrīpādaṁgaḷu Ā citrapurada du
rggā dēviya dēvālyadalu yoṭṭu naḍisuvaru . dānapālanayō
mmadhyē dānāt śrīyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvarga mavāpnōti pāla
nādacyutaṁ padaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ darmasētuṁ nrupāṇāṁ kālē

kālē pālanīyō mahadbhiḥ sarvvādvētān bhāvinaḥ ppārttivēṁdrān
bhūyō bhūyō yūcatē rāmacaṁdraḥ Ēkaiva bhaginī lōkēdvitēyā
nakadācanā nagrāhyā na karagrāsau pradattā vasuṁdharā śrīśrīśrī
śrīśrī maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
